payload.answer: Rejected. Normal users cannot execute administrative SQL commands, and no memory was created, modified, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user, not a user memory fact to store.

details: Detected attempted admin command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;

repair_options: If you intended to delete your own stored memory, use an authorized user-facing memory deletion request.
If you are an administrator, authenticate through the proper administrative channel before issuing database maintenance commands.
